funFacts: Heavy-duty semi-Freestyle Monster Truck Shows are powered by massive turbocharged diesel engines designed to haul up to 80,000 pounds of freight.
Freestyle Monster Truck Shows use engine compression brakes (Jake brakes) to slow down safely on steep mountain descents without overheating.
